info.title: OpenReturn API
info.description:
REST API for IRS Form 990 filings, organizations, and financial-health / qualitative scores.

**Authentication** is optional per deployment: when the server runs with `--auth`, every route requires an API key sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>` or `X-API-Key: <key>` (a 401 is returned otherwise, and a 429 if a per-key rate limit is exceeded).

**Errors**: validation and not-found conditions are returned as HTTP 200 with an `{"error": "..."}` body. 401/404/413/429/500 are produced by the server.

200.description: OK — the resource, or `{"error": …}` on an application error

post.summary: Upsert an organization (insert if EIN is new)

Field.description: A reported field value with its 990 schema location.

ScoreDebug.description: Read-only walkthrough of a model evaluation against a filing (formula, substituted numbers, variables + source, normalization).

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid API key (only when the server runs with --auth).

RateLimited.description: Per-key rate limit exceeded; a `Retry-After` header is sent.
